_comment: 复制此文件为 settings.json: cp .claude/settings.example.json .claude/settings.json

onSessionStart.command: cd ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.} && python3 scripts/workflow_state.py discover --format json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"active_count":0,"note":"workflow_state.py 不可用或不在项目根目录"}'
onSessionStart.description: 自动发现当前 OpenSpec change 状态：当前阶段、子状态、待推进路径、Gate 位置
